hero.name: Antique Roman Palace
hotel.welcome.title: Welcome to Antique Roman Palace
hotel.welcome.p1: Your paradise on the Mediterranean! Sun, sea, history, and romance are waiting for you. From our classic buildings, you will enjoy breathtaking views of the Alanya coastline. Just steps away you'll find ancient ruins, vibrant streets, and famous landmarks.
apartments.title: Our Rooms
comfort.title: Comfort & Style
comfort.p: Rooms for Every Mood. Choose between standard or suite — all featuring balconies, air conditioning, and a minibar. Interiors in Roman, Ottoman, and classic styles create an atmosphere of history and art right inside your room.
taste.title: Taste, Entertainment & Relaxation
taste.p: Ultra all-inclusive: Turkish and European cuisine, a sea-view restaurant, two pools, and a private beach. Daily shows, contests, Turkish night, live music. Plus a hammam, sauna, massage, and fitness facilities — for complete relaxation.
footer.about.summary: Antique Roman Palace invites you to experience timeless elegance and luxury by the sea. Enjoy a journey through history with modern comfort.
footer.contact.title: Contact Us
footer.bottom: © 2025 Antique Roman Palace — All rights reserved
hero.title: Our Story
hero.subtitle: Where ancient Roman elegance meets modern luxury on the Mediterranean coast
story.title: Legacy of Excellence
story.p1: Founded in 1998, Antique Roman Palace was created as a place where modern comfort meets the spirit of majestic antiquity. Our hotel is inspired by the aesthetics of Ancient Rome: columns, marble statues, mosaic panels, and the atmosphere of a true seaside palace.
story.p2: From the first step into our lobby, guests enter a space where history comes alive — with interiors thoughtfully designed to the smallest detail and with respect for classical art. There are no random elements: every niche, chandelier, and arch is chosen to convey a sense of grandeur, harmony, and serenity.
story.p3: We are located in a picturesque part of Alanya, just steps away from the Mediterranean Sea and close to the city's cultural attractions — the fortress, port, and Cleopatra Beach. Antique Roman Palace operates under the Adults Only concept and offers guests an atmosphere of private relaxation where the sea, history, and service merge into one.
features.title: Why Choose Us
features.1.title: Comfortable Rooms
features.1.text: Our rooms are carefully designed with guest comfort in mind: cozy beds, modern equipment, climate control. Many of them open to Mediterranean Sea views.
features.2.title: Culinary Diversity
features.2.text: Our hotel restaurants offer Turkish cuisine alongside several international options. We strive to satisfy different tastes, including vegetarian dishes.
features.3.title: SPA and Relaxation
features.3.text: We offer a spa center with hammam, massage rooms, and relaxation areas — the perfect place to rejuvenate after travel.
features.4.title: Personalized Service
features.4.text: Our staff works 24/7 and is ready to help with any questions — from organizing transfers to leisure recommendations.
features.5.title: Recreation Areas
features.5.text: We offer a private beach, fitness center, and lounge areas. All of these are available to ensure our guests' comfortable stay.
features.6.title: Convenient Location
features.6.text: We are located in a convenient area of Alanya, near the sea and city infrastructure. Guests can easily combine beach walks, cafe visits, and short city trips.
team.title: Our Team
team.1.name: Mehmet Yilmaz
team.1.description: With over 20 years of experience in hospitality, Mehmet ensures that every guest experiences the true meaning of Turkish hospitality.
team.2.name: Ayşe Demir
team.2.description: Ayşe and her team strive to make your stay memorable through personalized service and exceptional attention to detail.
team.3.name: Chef Hasan
team.3.description: Chef Hasan creates culinary masterpieces that combine traditional Turkish flavors with international cuisine.
team.4.name: Zeynep Kaya
team.4.description: Zeynep and her wellness team provide rejuvenating treatments inspired by ancient Roman and Turkish traditions.
cta.title: Experience Roman Elegance
cta.description: Join thousands of satisfied guests who have discovered the perfect balance of historic charm and modern luxury at Antique Roman Palace.
restaurant.hero.title: Restaurants & Bars
restaurant.hero.subtitle: Experience refined flavors where Roman elegance blends with Mediterranean charm
restaurant.main.title: Main Restaurant
restaurant.main.description: The restaurant is decorated in Ottoman style. Enjoy a buffet and sea view.
restaurant.harem.title: HAREM Restaurant
restaurant.harem.description: A'LA CARTE restaurant with Ottoman and Italian cuisine. Advance reservation required.
restaurant.agora.title: Agora Bar
restaurant.agora.description: Cocktails, drinks and light snacks, decorated with plants and sculptures.
restaurant.american.title: American Bar
restaurant.american.description: Cocktails, drinks and light snacks, served indoors among elegant décor, lush plants, and artistic sculptures
restaurant.american.note: Open exclusively on cozy cold or rainy days
restaurant.beach.title: Beach Bar
restaurant.beach.description: Beach bar with free drinks and sunbeds in front of the hotel.
gallery.hero.title: Gallery
gallery.hero.subtitle: Where ancient Roman elegance meets modern luxury on the shore of the Mediterranean Sea
rooms.hero.title: Choose Your Stay
rooms.hero.subtitle: From refined simplicity to royal comfort — explore rooms designed for relaxation, elegance, and unforgettable moments.
rooms.economy.title: Economy
rooms.economy.description: A cozy room with all the essentials for a comfortable stay. The perfect balance of price and quality.
rooms.standard.title: Standard
rooms.standard.description: A spacious room with modern design. A perfect choice for a business trip or leisure.
rooms.comfort.title: Comfort
rooms.comfort.description: A spacious room with increased comfort and a beautiful view. For those who value coziness and aesthetics.
rooms.queen.title: Queen Suite
rooms.queen.description: A luxurious suite with a separate living area. The perfect space for special moments. фффффф
rooms.king.title: King Suite
rooms.king.description: An exclusive presidential suite with maximum comfort and premium service.
